zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Broughton於1530年9月出生在英國斯塔福爾隆格頓時，他的父親Thomas Broughton24歲，母親Elizabeth Margaret Isabel Acton38歲。他於大約1551年與Eleanor Ruggeley在英國斯塔福爾隆格頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1635年在英國斯塔福爾享年105歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Broughton于1530年9月出生在英国斯塔福爾隆格頓时，他的父亲Thomas Broughton24岁，母亲Elizabeth Margaret Isabel Acton38岁。他于大约1551年与Eleanor Ruggeley在英国斯塔福爾隆格頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1635年在英国斯塔福爾享年105岁。

nameMeanings.name: Broughton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places in all parts of England called Broughton. The first element is variously Old English brōc ‘brook’, burg ‘fortress’, or beorg ‘hill, mound’; the second is in all cases Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Braughton
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Broughton  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Broughton was born in September 1530, in Longdon, Staffordshire, England, his father, Thomas Broughton, was 24 and his mother, Elizabeth Margaret Isabel Acton, was 38. He married Eleanor Ruggeley about 1551, in Longdon, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1635, in Staffordshire, England, at the age of 105.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Broughton est né en septembre 1530, à Longdon, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Broughton, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Margaret Isabel Acton, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Ruggeley environ 1551, à Longdon, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1635, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 105 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Broughton im September 1530 in Longdon, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Broughton 24 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Margaret Isabel Acton 38. Er hat um 1551 in Longdon, Staffordshire, England Eleanor Ruggeley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1635 im Alter von 105 Jahren in Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Broughton è nato il nel settembre 1530 nel Longdon, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Broughton, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Margaret Isabel Acton, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Ruggeley circa 1551, nel Longdon, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1635, nel Staffordshire, England, all'età di 105 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Broughtonが1530年9月にイギリススタフォードシュアイアロングドンで生まれた時，父Thomas Broughtonは24歳，母Elizabeth Margaret Isabel Actonは38歳であった。約1551年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアロングドンでEleanor Ruggeleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1635年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで105歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Broughton(이)가 1530년 9월 영국 스태퍼드실르 론그던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Broughton(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Margaret Isabel Acton(은)는 38세였다. 그는 대략 1551년 영국 스태퍼드실르 론그던에서 Eleanor Ruggeley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1635년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 105세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Broughton nasceu em setembro de 1530, em Longdon, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Broughton, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Margaret Isabel Acton, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Ruggeley aproximadamente 1551, em Longdon, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1635, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 105 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Broughton родился сентябрь 1530 г. в местности лонгдон, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Broughton было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Margaret Isabel Acton, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Ruggeley около 1551 г. в местности лонгдон, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1635 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 105 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Broughton nació en septiembre de 1530, en Longdon, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Broughton, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Margaret Isabel Acton, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Eleanor Ruggeley aproximadamente 1551, en Longdon, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1635, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 105 años.
